title: Whose Wife
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Harry! what, that yourself, back to old Vic., man,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Down from the Never Land? Now, whatן¿½s your game?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Ugly as ever. Not dropped the old trick, man?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Say, whatן¿½ll you take with me? Give it a name.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Here long? Well, rather, lad; five years and over,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Settled for good, and supporting a wife.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Slipped from the saddle, and living in clover,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Swore off a heap, and Iן¿½ve slung the old life.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Whatן¿½s come of Taffy, and Brum, and the rest of them?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Long since you broke with the Poverty push?ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Bill, youן¿½re on top, youן¿½ve the best of the best of them.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Poor Brumן¿½s a dummy, Taff died in the bush;

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Bobן¿½s cook for Chows on an absenteeן¿½s station,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Samן¿½s tout for spielers, Peteן¿½s lumbered for life;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Iן¿½m on a tramp through the whole of creation,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Tracking a woman, my runaway wife.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Left me six years agoן¿½sloped! I was shearing
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Up on the Thomson. She left not a word;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Last year was seen by a Barcoo man, steering
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Round about here, and thatן¿½s all that Iן¿½ve heard.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Heard of her, know her, Bill?ן¿½tallish and clever,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Blue eyes, dark hair, and sheן¿½s branded here, so;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Not one to liquor, or go on the never,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ But skittish and queer in her tantrums, you know.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ This is her picture, Bill; just have a look at her.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Like any female you chance to have seen?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Hallo! here, hold up! Say, man, whatן¿½s the matter?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Your Wife! By the Lord, Morton, what do you mean?ן¿½
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Dyson represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Edward Dyson's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
